# INPlayMediaPlaybackSpeedUnsupportedReason.aboveMaximum

**Case**

A reason that indicates the requested playback speed is above the maximum supported playback speed.

## Declaration

```swift
case aboveMaximum
```

## Constants

- **INPlayMediaPlaybackSpeedUnsupportedReason.belowMinimum**: A reasson that indicates the requested playback speed is below the minimum supported playback speed.

items.description: A reasson that indicates the requested playback speed is below the minimum supported playback speed.
